tasks.name: Technical Vision & Direction
tasks.description: Defining the overall technical approach and aligning it with business objectives and architectural guidelines.

tasks.name: Technology Stack Decision
tasks.description: Making final technology choices for languages, frameworks, libraries, and infrastructure in collaboration with the Architect.

tasks.name: Team Capability Assessment
tasks.description: Evaluating team skills, identifying gaps, and recommending training, hiring, or knowledge transfer needs.

tasks.name: Technical Risk Assessment
tasks.description: Identifying high-impact technical risks, dependencies on external systems, and proposing mitigation strategies.

tasks.name: Estimation Leadership
tasks.description: Leading technical estimation efforts, validating developer estimates, and ensuring realistic delivery commitments.

tasks.name: Technical Design & Solution Design
tasks.description: Producing detailed technical designs, component diagrams, and sequence diagrams for complex features.

tasks.name: Coding Standards & Conventions
tasks.description: Establishing coding guidelines, branching strategies, commit conventions, and PR review standards for the team.

tasks.name: Task Decomposition & Assignment
tasks.description: Breaking down features into well-scoped technical tasks and assigning them based on team strengths and growth goals.

tasks.name: Build & Toolchain Setup
tasks.description: Setting up project scaffolding, build pipelines, linting, formatting, testing frameworks, and developer workflows.

tasks.name: Cross-Team Technical Alignment
tasks.description: Coordinating API contracts, integration protocols, and shared libraries with other development teams.

tasks.name: Code Review & Quality Gatekeeping
tasks.description: Ensuring code quality through systematic PR reviews, architectural compliance checks, and quality gates.

tasks.name: Hands-On Development
tasks.description: Contributing directly to codebase on critical paths, complex features, and setting implementation patterns.

tasks.name: Technical Decision Making
tasks.description: Making day-to-day technical decisions on implementation approaches, library choices, and trade-offs.

tasks.name: Unblocking the Team
tasks.description: Removing technical blockers, debugging complex issues, and providing guidance to unblock team members.

tasks.name: Technical Debt Governance
tasks.description: Managing technical debt backlog, prioritizing remediation, and balancing debt reduction with feature delivery.

tasks.name: Critical Bug Investigation
tasks.description: Leading investigation of critical/blocker bugs, performing root cause analysis, and coordinating fixes.

tasks.name: Performance & Scalability Review
tasks.description: Reviewing performance test results, identifying bottlenecks, and recommending optimizations.

tasks.name: Release Candidate Validation
tasks.description: Validating release candidates for technical completeness, stability, and production readiness.

tasks.name: Technical Go/No-Go Input
tasks.description: Providing technical assessment for go/no-go decisions at release gates.

tasks.name: Production Readiness Review
tasks.description: Conducting production readiness reviews covering monitoring, alerting, runbooks, and rollback plans.

tasks.name: Incident Leadership
tasks.description: Leading technical incident response, coordinating debugging efforts, and driving resolution.

tasks.name: Technical Retrospective
tasks.description: Facilitating technical retrospectives to capture lessons learned and drive continuous improvement.

tasks.name: Team Development & Mentoring
tasks.description: Mentoring team members, conducting code reviews for learning, and fostering technical growth.

tasks.name: Innovation & Improvement
tasks.description: Driving technical innovation, evaluating new tools/practices, and championing engineering excellence.
